name: Aaronson Corn Muffin
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the Green Giant Mexicorn and bacon to the recipe for enhanced flavor, though plain corn muffins are also delicious without these ingredients.
2. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
3. Line a 12-cup muffin tin with cupcake liners.
4. Whisk flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt together in a bowl and set aside.
5. In another bowl, whisk sour cream, eggs, and melted butter until well-blended.
6. Make a well in the dry ingredients and pour in the wet mixture. If using Mexicorn and bacon, add them now.
7. Using a spatula, gently fold the ingredients together just until combined—avoid overmixing.
8. Spoon the batter into the prepared muffin cups, filling each about 3/4 full.
9. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
